ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the contributor belongs to */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group the contributor is part of */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Business type of the contributor */,
  "demographic" REAL /* Demographic information, such as percentage of democratic or republican support */,
  "party_affiliation" REAL /* Party affiliation of the contributor */,
  "total_donation" REAL /* Total amount donated by the contributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contributor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contributor */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the contributor */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor making the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount donated */,
  "demographic_representation" REAL /* Demographic representation of the donation (e.g., #0000FFAF) */,
  "party_representation" REAL /* Party representation of the donation (e.g., #0000FFAF) */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex color code for visualization purposes */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., cash, in-kind, etc.) */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the recipient */,
  "donation_description" TEXT /* Description of the donation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the donation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the donation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the donation category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the donation category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the donation tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the donation tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_to_categories" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_to_tags" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donation */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id", "tag_id")
)
